howItWorks.title: How Sukan works
howItWorks.tenantsBody: Search by state, neighborhood, or budget. Contact verified landlords on WhatsApp. No middlemen.
howItWorks.landlordsBody: Text our WhatsApp bot a few photos and details. We translate, format, and publish your listing.
howItWorks.diasporaBody: Pay in USD, browse remotely, get help from local agents who know the ground truth.

about.title: We're building Sudan's home for housing
about.subtitle: A platform built by Sudanese, for Sudanese — connecting people to homes with transparency, technology, and trust.
about.whyP1: Sudan has been through seismic upheaval. Millions have been displaced — some across borders, others across city lines — and the housing market has fractured along with them. In the absence of a trusted, modern platform, tenants rely on word-of-mouth, landlords lose reach, and the diaspora invests blind.
about.whyP2: Sukan was built to fix that. We started with a simple insight: the biggest barrier to finding a home in Sudan isn't supply — it's trust and information. Listings are scattered, prices are opaque, and nobody has built a bilingual platform that works for someone in Khartoum and someone in Toronto at the same time.
about.whyP3: We're building that platform. Verified listings, USD pricing for the diaspora, WhatsApp-first contact for people on low-bandwidth connections, and a bilingual interface that treats Arabic as a first-class language — not an afterthought.
about.believe1Body: Every listing on Sukan goes through a verification layer. We'd rather show fewer properties than mislead a tenant or waste a landlord's time.
about.believe2Body: Arabic is not a translation of English on Sukan — it's a parallel experience. Every feature ships in both languages simultaneously, with direction-aware layout.
about.believe3Body: Sudan's diaspora spans six continents. We price in USD, support remote due diligence, and provide local advisor contacts so investing from abroad is genuinely possible.
about.teamBody: We're a small, Sudanese-diaspora team distributed across the globe — engineers, designers, and operators who've all experienced the frustration of Sudan's housing market firsthand. We're building the platform we wished had existed.

diasporaPage.title: Invest in Sudan from anywhere in the world
diasporaPage.subtitle: USD-priced verified properties, bilingual support, and a local advisor network — designed so you can transact with confidence from wherever you are.
diasporaPage.why1Body: All listings show prices in US dollars alongside the local Sudanese pound equivalent, so you always know what you're paying before you arrive.
diasporaPage.why2Body: Every property on Sukan is reviewed before publishing. We check ownership documents and flag inconsistencies so you're not relying on photos alone.
diasporaPage.why3Body: We connect diaspora buyers with trusted on-the-ground agents who can visit properties, negotiate on your behalf, and guide you through the local closing process.
diasporaPage.howTitle: How remote investing works on Sukan
diasporaPage.step1Body: Filter by state, budget, property type, and diaspora-friendly tags. Every listing shows USD price, verified badge, and photo gallery.
diasporaPage.step2Body: Request an introduction to a vetted local advisor in the property's state. They'll arrange a walkthrough and answer your questions in real time.
diasporaPage.step3Body: Your advisor shares ownership documents and title deeds digitally. Review them with your own legal counsel before committing.
diasporaPage.step4Body: Pay your listing deposit via Stripe (card, USD) or arrange an international bank transfer. The advisor handles the local closing paperwork.
diasporaPage.t1Quote: I was living in Toronto and needed to secure a family home in Khartoum quickly. Sukan matched me with a local advisor in 48 hours. The whole thing closed in three weeks.
diasporaPage.t2Quote: The USD pricing removed all the uncertainty. I knew exactly what I was paying, and the verified badge meant I wasn't flying blind. Highly recommend for anyone abroad.
diasporaPage.currenciesBody: All properties on Sukan display prices in USD for clarity and in SDG for local context. Diaspora buyers can pay listing deposits and advisor fees via Stripe (Visa, Mastercard, and major debit cards in USD). Local landlords and tenants can settle in Sudanese pounds via bank transfer. We never charge undisclosed conversion fees — the rate shown is the rate you pay.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.introBody: Sukan ('we', 'our', or 'us') operates the Sukan platform, accessible at sukan.app and associated mobile applications. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard information about users of our service — tenants, landlords, agents, and diaspora investors. By using Sukan, you agree to the practices described in this document. If you disagree with any part, please discontinue use of the platform.
privacy.collectBody: We collect information you provide directly: account registration data (email address, full name, phone number, and chosen password hash), listing content (property descriptions, photos, location coordinates, and pricing), and inquiry messages sent through the platform. We also collect data generated through your use of the service: browsing behaviour, search queries, pages visited, time on page, and device identifiers. When you contact a landlord via WhatsApp through a Sukan-generated link, we record that an inquiry was initiated — but we do not access the content of your WhatsApp conversation. We use cookies and similar tracking technologies as described in the Cookies section below.
privacy.useBody: We use your information to operate and improve the platform: to publish and index listings, to route inquiry messages to the correct landlord, to personalise search results, and to send transactional communications (listing confirmation, inquiry notification, payment receipt). We may use aggregated, anonymised usage data for internal analytics and product development. We will not use your personal data for automated decision-making that produces legal or similarly significant effects without your explicit consent.
privacy.sharingBody: We do not sell your personal data to third parties. We share information only in the following circumstances: (1) When a tenant submits an inquiry, the landlord receives the tenant's name, phone number, and message. (2) We engage service providers who process data on our behalf under confidentiality agreements — this includes cloud hosting (Supabase/AWS), payment processing (Stripe), and email delivery (Resend). (3) We may disclose information if required by law, court order, or government authority with lawful jurisdiction. (4) In the event of a merger or acquisition, user data may be transferred to the successor entity, with advance notice provided to affected users.
privacy.retentionBody: Your data is stored on servers located in the EU (AWS eu-central-1 region). We retain account data for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, we remove your personal profile and listings within 30 days, subject to any legal obligations requiring longer retention (for example, payment records which may be retained for up to seven years for tax compliance). Anonymised, aggregated data derived from your usage is retained indefinitely for analytics purposes.
privacy.rightsBody: You have the right to access the personal data we hold about you, to request corrections, and to request deletion of your account and associated data. You may also object to certain processing activities or request that we restrict processing while a complaint is under review. To exercise any of these rights, contact us at privacy@sukan.app. We will respond within 30 days. If you believe your rights have been violated, you have the right to lodge a complaint with the applicable data protection authority.
privacy.cookiesBody: Sukan uses strictly necessary session cookies to maintain your logged-in state, and optional analytics cookies (via Plausible Analytics, a privacy-first provider that does not fingerprint users or share data with advertisers) to understand aggregate usage patterns. We do not use third-party advertising cookies. You can disable optional cookies through your browser settings at any time without affecting core platform functionality.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or applicable law. When we make material changes, we will notify you by email (if you have an account) and by posting a prominent notice on the platform at least 14 days before the changes take effect. Your continued use of Sukan after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
privacy.contactBody: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your rights, please email privacy@sukan.app. For general support, contact hello@sukan.app. We aim to respond to all inquiries within two business days.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceBody: By accessing or using the Sukan platform — whether via web browser, mobile application, or API — you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you are using Sukan on behalf of a business or organisation, you represent that you have authority to bind that entity to these terms. If you do not agree, you may not use the platform.
terms.serviceBody: Sukan is an online marketplace that connects property owners and agents with prospective tenants and buyers in Sudan. We provide the technology infrastructure — search, listing publication, inquiry routing, and payment processing for listing fees — but we are not a party to any tenancy agreement, sale contract, or other transaction between users. Sukan does not own, manage, or control any of the properties listed on the platform.
terms.obligationsBody: By using Sukan, you agree to: (1) Provide accurate, complete, and up-to-date information in any listing, profile, or inquiry you submit. (2) Refrain from sending unsolicited commercial messages (spam) to other users. (3) Comply with all applicable Sudanese laws and regulations, including those governing property ownership, tenancy, and foreign investment. (4) Not use the platform to facilitate money laundering, fraud, or any other unlawful activity. (5) Not attempt to circumvent Sukan's systems, scrape data without authorisation, or interfere with the platform's operation. Violation of these obligations may result in immediate account suspension.
terms.listingsPolicyBody: Listings must represent real properties that the poster has lawful authority to rent or sell. We prohibit: fraudulent listings, listings for properties the poster does not control, discriminatory listings that refuse tenants based on ethnicity, gender, religion, or national origin, listings for properties acquired through illegal means, and duplicate or spam listings. Sukan reserves the right to remove any listing at its sole discretion and without prior notice if it violates this policy or applicable law.
terms.paymentsBody: Listing fees are charged in USD. Standard listings cost $15 for 30 days; featured listings cost $40 for 30 days. Payment is processed via Stripe (card) or bank transfer. Listing fees are non-refundable once a listing has been published, except where Sukan removes the listing for reasons attributable to Sukan (for example, a technical error in our publishing system). Refund requests must be submitted within 7 days of the original payment to hello@sukan.app.
terms.disclaimerBody: Sukan acts solely as a technology intermediary. We do not act as a real estate agent, broker, escrow agent, or legal adviser. We do not verify the legal title to any property, nor do we guarantee the accuracy of any information provided by a landlord or agent. Any transaction entered into between users on the basis of a Sukan listing is between those users alone. Sukan is not liable for any loss arising from such transactions, including but not limited to deposit loss, fraudulent listings, or misrepresentation by a landlord or tenant.
terms.privacyRefBody: Your use of Sukan is also governed by our Privacy Policy, which is incorporated into these Terms by reference. Please read it carefully before using the platform.
terms.terminationBody: Sukan may suspend or terminate your account at any time, with or without notice, for conduct that we determine violates these Terms, poses a risk to other users, or harms the reputation or operation of the platform. You may close your account at any time via your dashboard settings. Upon termination, your listings will be taken offline and your personal data will be handled according to our Privacy Policy retention schedule.
terms.disputesBody: Sukan is not responsible for resolving disputes between users. If you have a dispute with another user arising from a transaction facilitated by Sukan, we encourage you to attempt to resolve it directly. Sukan may, at its discretion, provide information to assist in dispute resolution but is not obligated to do so and will not act as an arbitrator.
terms.governingLawBody: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Sudan. Any dispute arising under these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the competent courts of Sudan. Note: the exact governing jurisdiction will be updated once Sukan's legal entity registration is finalised.
terms.changesBody: We may update these Terms from time to time. We will notify users of material changes by email (if you have an account) and by posting a notice on the platform at least 14 days before the changes take effect. Your continued use of Sukan after the effective date constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.
terms.contactBody: For questions about these Terms, please email legal@sukan.app. For general support, contact hello@sukan.app.

contact.title: We're here to help
contact.subtitle: Whether you're a tenant, landlord, investor, or just curious — reach out and we'll get back to you fast.
contact.whatsappBody: The fastest way to reach us. Message our team directly for listing help, diaspora inquiries, or general questions. We're online 7 days a week.
contact.emailBody: Prefer email? Send us a message at hello@sukan.app. We respond within 2 business days. For privacy-specific queries, use privacy@sukan.app.
contact.telegramBody: Follow our Telegram channel for new listing alerts, market updates, and platform announcements. Channel coming soon.
contact.hiringBody: We're a small, remote-first Sudanese diaspora team. If you're passionate about Sudan, real estate, and building things that matter — we'd love to hear from you. Drop us a line at hello@sukan.app with the subject line 'Joining the team'.
contact.officeBody: We operate remotely for now. A Khartoum office is coming — watch this space.
